subject: fix(audit): code review fixes — types, keys, validation, a11y, immutability
body:
Full code review audit addressing quality, correctness, and accessibility
issues across the codebase:

- Rename InterestForm's FormData interface to InterestFormData to avoid
  shadowing the global FormData type
- Add client-side validatePayload call before network requests in
  InterestForm for faster feedback and reduced unnecessary API calls
- Replace fragile text-as-key patterns in About.tsx and TimelineItem.tsx
  with stable index-based keys (static lists that never reorder)
- Hoist browser detection to module level in usePWAInstall to avoid
  re-deriving on every render and make empty useEffect deps honest
- Stabilize showManualInstructions with useMemo keyed on isInstalled
- Refactor DebugBanner runDiagnostics to use immutable array updates
  (replaceLast helper) instead of mutable index-based mutations
- Add explicit ReactNode import in Section.tsx instead of relying on
  ambient React namespace
- Replace console.warn in useRepoTorEmbed with debugLog for consistent
  logging through the shared pub/sub store
- Add skip-to-content link and main#main-content for WCAG 2.1 SC 2.4.1
- Wrap footer social links in <nav aria-label="Social links">
- Add 4 new cv-data tests: project fields, education fields, skill
  categories, and project count (46 total, all passing)

Tags: audit, quality, a11y, validation, types, testing
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-audit
Semver: patch
